fields.name: id
fields.explanation: The key field — uniquely identifies the document. Always retrievable. Cannot be searchable. Use a stable SKU or GUID; never the title.

fields.name: title
fields.explanation: Searchable text with the English Microsoft analyzer. Tokenized, lowercased, stemmed. BM25 will score matches here highly.

fields.name: description
fields.explanation: The body text used for both keyword and vector retrieval. Keep it concise — long descriptions should be chunked into multiple documents.

fields.name: descriptionVector
fields.explanation: A 1536-d dense vector produced by text-embedding-3-large on the description. Stored in an HNSW graph. Used for vector queries; not searchable as text.

fields.name: category
fields.explanation: Used to scope queries (filter=category eq 'Jackets') and to power left-rail facets. Not searchable; do not embed.

fields.name: price
fields.explanation: Numeric field. Filterable (price lt 200) and sortable (orderby=price asc). Numeric fields cannot be searchable.

fields.name: stock
fields.explanation: Inventory count, refreshed by the indexer on a 5-minute schedule. Filter on stock gt 0 to hide out-of-stock items.
